text.title: AIOps: ML-Powered Incident Detection and Auto-Remediation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the AIOps: ML-Powered Incident Detection and Auto-Remediation methodology end-to-end. Each step declares input, action, output, and decision-gate.

step.name: collect-baseline
step.action: Collect metrics + logs + traces for >= 14 days.
step.decision-gate: < 14 days: STOP, do not enable ML.

step.name: map-seasonality
step.decision-gate: Static thresholds without seasonality map rejected.

step.name: choose-anomaly-algorithm
step.decision-gate: Skip directly to LSTM without justification rejected.

step.name: classify-remediation-actions
step.action: Tag each action low / medium / high risk; build approval matrix.

step.name: wire-rca-output
step.action: Output ranked causes + timeline + scope + log/trace links.
